---
pagetitle: "Yalemzewod A Gelaw"
title: ""
image: "images/yalem.jpg"
about: 
 template: jolla
 image-shape: rounded
 image-width: 16em
 links: 
   - icon: linkedin
     text: linkdeIn
     href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yalemzewod-gelaw
     target: _blank
   - icon: twitter
     text: X
     href: https://twitter.com/yalassefa
     target: _blank
   - icon: github
     text: GitHub
     href: https://github.com/yalemzewod
     target: _blank
   - icon: envelop
     text: Email
     href: mailto:'yalassefa@gmail.com'
     target: _blank
   - icon: orcid
     text: OrcId
     href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5338-586X
     target: _blank
   - icon: youtube
     text: YouTube
     href: https://youtube.com/@yz1121?si=y7dpAlVtlEnGRSSm
     target: _blank
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
---

### Hello there!

<p class="topbr">

Welcome to my website! I'm Yalemzewod Gelaw, a data enthusiast who loves uncovering stories hidden in data. 

Here, I share my journey exploring data science, statistical analysis, and epidemiology. You'll find blog posts, tutorials, and code snippets packed with insights and practical applications that turn raw data into actionable knowledge.

Dive in, explore, and let's geek out about data together! Got ideas or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you! 📊✨

</p>

------------------------------------------------------------------------
